---
title: "Briana Maximino"
subtitle: "Future Marketing Strategist Portfolio Draft"
author: "Website Planning Presentation"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    incremental: true
    self-contained: false
---

# Portfolio Website Vision

## Main goal of this website

- Present my marketing projects professionally  
- Show real student learning journey  
- Build personal brand identity  
- Support internship opportunities  
- Demonstrate strategic thinking  
- Create digital marketing presence  

---

# Personal Brand Direction

## How I want to be seen

- Aspiring marketing strategist  
- Data-driven decision maker  
- Creative campaign thinker  
- Business-minded student  
- Future sports marketing professional  
- Growth-focused learner  

---

# Homepage Layout Draft

## Planned homepage structure

- Short professional introduction  
- Career goal statement  
- Highlighted marketing project  
- Simple navigation menu  
- Clean modern layout  
- Professional first impression  

---

# About Me Page Plan

## Key content ideas

- Business Administration background  
- Marketing concentration focus  
- Academic experience summary  
- Marketing skill development  
- Career interests explanation  
- Resume download feature  

---

# Marketing Projects Section

## How projects will be structured

- Project overview first  
- Marketing problem explained  
- Strategy and execution shown  
- Campaign outcomes discussed  
- Personal learning reflection  
- Skills clearly highlighted  

---

# Example Project Structure

## Super Soakerz Campaign

- Student business concept explanation  
- Target market identification  
- Marketing campaign development  
- Promotion strategy execution  
- Campaign effectiveness reflection  
- Strategic marketing insights gained  

---

# Analytics & Data Section

## Purpose of this section

- Demonstrate GA4 knowledge  
- Show marketing performance thinking  
- Present data-based insights  
- Explain consumer behavior analysis  
- Connect data to strategy decisions  
- Highlight analytical growth  

---

# Career Direction Page

## Long-term marketing vision

- Interest in sports marketing industry  
- Focus on brand engagement strategies  
- Goal of marketing internship experience  
- Development of strategic skills  
- Interest in digital marketing growth  
- Commitment to continuous learning  

---

# Website Design Strategy

## Visual identity plan

- Minimal professional design  
- Neutral modern color palette  
- Clear typography hierarchy  
- Organized content layout  
- Strong readability focus  
- Simple but strategic aesthetic  

---

# Professional Contact Section

## Planned elements

- LinkedIn profile connection  
- Professional email access  
- Resume viewing option  
- Future project updates  
- Networking opportunities  

---

# Final Reflection

## Why this portfolio matters

- Helps organize academic marketing work  
- Builds early professional identity  
- Supports internship competitiveness  
- Demonstrates strategic mindset  
- Shows continuous skill development  
- Represents long-term career goals
